description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a sleek, dark exterior and a minimalist design, placed on a light wooden floor. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. Two green and one yellow accent pillows add a pop of color and visual interest to the otherwise monochromatic piece. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, with no visible legs, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design. The upholstery appears smooth and slightly glossy, indicating a leather or faux leather material.
description: A sleek, dark three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, smooth upholstery, and colorful accent pillows, set on a light wooden floor. The design is modern and minimalist, with attached cushions and a boxy silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two green and one yellow accent pillows, and straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back with no visible legs or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's side profile and the arrangement of the cushions and pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and three matching back cushions; two green and one yellow loose accent pillows placed on the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design, possibly recessed beneath the sofa frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, and slightly glossy upholstery with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
